title: Fren Worl Pack
description: Vanilla-Like modpack made to work with server side mods on Fren Worl server, Including Distant Horizons and Simple Voice Chat. Server can also be accessed on Vanilla or Bedrock client
body:
Fren Worl Pack is a very simple modpack designed to be a drop in replacement for Vanilla to allow use of server side mods on Fren Worl Server. 

The pack has very few mods that should change the vanilla experience unless you go into the settings and configure them yourself.

**On the server**, Mods that interface with client side mods are Distant Horizons, Simple Voice Chat, No Chat Reports, Shulkerboxtooltip, Servux, Apple Skin
